description_long: This is a tall, rectangular wooden cabinet with a rich, dark brown finish and a subtle diagonal wood grain pattern. The front features a recessed open shelf in the upper-middle section, with two solid panels below that likely conceal storage compartments. The sides are flat and unadorned, emphasizing the cabinet's sleek, modern design. The back is fully enclosed, matching the wood grain of the rest of the structure. The cabinet stands on short, sturdy legs, elevating it slightly above the ground and giving it a stable presence suitable for urban interiors or sheltered outdoor spaces.
description: A tall, dark brown wooden cabinet with a recessed open shelf and two solid lower panels, standing on short legs.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open shelf and two solid lower panels, with the wood grain clearly visible.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the cabinet's depth and the stepped profile created by the recessed shelf.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a continuous wood grain surface with no visible openings or features.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring the stepped profile and depth of the cabinet.
